extract: Scolipede (Japanese: ペンドラー Pendror) is a dual-type Bug/Poison Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves from Whirlipede starting at level 30. It is the final form of Venipede. Scolipede can Mega Evolve into Mega Scolipede using the Scolipite. Mega Scolipede was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
